---
name: '🐛 Bug Report'
about: Create a report to help us fix a bug or unexpected behavior in SOC Toolkit
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📝 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '`soc ...`'
2. See error traceback

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 💻 Environment & OS Details
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Sonoma]
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- **SOC Toolkit Version**: [e.g. 6.0.0]

## 📋 Additional Context / Logs
Add any other context or terminal log tracebacks about the problem here.
